2 - Claims not met, FFS

SCHI_MEDICAID Schizophrenia Indicator - Medicaid Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having Schizophrenia Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
SCHI_MEDICARE Schizophrenia Indicator - Medicare Only Data NUM 1 This code
